# Privacy

Paper and Book to Visual Learning is a local workflow package. The repository itself does not operate a hosted service, collect analytics, or receive source documents.

The Skill may ask the active agent environment to read files supplied by the user, call an available image-generation provider, create local outputs, or deploy an HTML site when explicitly requested. Data handling therefore also depends on the selected agent platform, model provider, deployment provider, and any tools configured by the user.

Users should not publish private documents, credentials, cookies, personal paths, or confidential output in GitHub issues or pull requests. Review generated artifacts before sharing or deployment.

Questions can be submitted through the repository's GitHub Issues without attaching private source material.
